_comment: Maps each bridge-classroom classroom (by stable id) to the Bridge-Attendance dashboard session taxonomy. 'session' must be "Morning", "Afternoon", or null (online/special sections the dashboard should not move-detect). 'active' is true for currently-running terms, false for archived. The 'name' field is for human reference only; the exporter keys off the id. Classrooms NOT listed here are exported with session=null, active=true, and trigger a Pushover alert so they get classified.
